headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks with Competitive Advantages
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is full of established businesses, but only some continue to outperform the market. A few standout companies are thriving thanks to strong fundamentals and sustained competitive advantages.

headline: These Americans are quitting before AI can take their jobs—and starting their own businesses: 'I just wanted to be in control'
summary: Americans are incorporating new businesses in record numbers, as AI sweeps across many U.S. workplaces. That's not a coincidence, some new entrepreneurs say.

headline: Affirm (AFRM) Expands Partnerships Driving Fintech Growth
